creator: tijl@coosemans.org
text:
On Thu, 17 Oct 2013 17:33:56 +0200 Grzegorz Blach wrote:
> Staging in graphics/edje works correctly for me.
> Could point me out what kind of objection do you have?
> I need more details if something is really wrong.

It fails in all package builds, e.g.:
http://beefy1.isc.freebsd.org/bulk/91i386-default/2013-10-16_14h14m28s/logs/errors/edje-1.7.8,2.log
